name: Chambray Striped Kids' Sham - Pillowfort™
description: Bring breezy flair to their room with the Chambray Stripes Sham from Pillowfort™. Made from 100% cotton and pre-washed for softness, this cotton-quilted sham feels soft against their skin to help them stay comfy in bed. Adorned with vertical stripes with soft contrast edging, you can easily mix and match it with different pillows, comforters and bedding sets to add sweet style to their room.
